summary: Iteration 150: RPG Wellness MMORPG Frontend - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) /rpg route registered in App.js and loads correctly, (2) Character tab shows equipment slots (head/body/conduit/trinket) and stats with allocation buttons, (3) All 5 tabs switch correctly (Character/Inventory/World/Bosses/Circle), (4) Inventory shows items with equip/use buttons on hover, (5) World Map shows 3/9 discovered regions with fog-of-war, (6) Bosses tab shows 3 bosses with HP bars, phases, and join buttons, (7) Boss battle UI shows attack buttons (meditate/frequency/breathe) and damage feedback, (8) Circle tab shows create/join buttons when not in a party, (9) Backend APIs all working (17/17 pytest tests passed).

issues: Two items labeled 'Realm' in Explore section - one goes to /starseed-realm, other to /rpg. Consider renaming RPG one to 'RPG Realm' or 'Cosmic Realm' for clarity

action_items: MINOR: Consider renaming the RPG 'Realm' link in Dashboard.js to 'RPG Realm' or 'Cosmic Realm' to distinguish from 'Starseed Realm'
